summary: Comprehensive testing of Dynamic Escrow Intelligence feature. All 25 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified all key elements: escrow list with cards, create form, detail page with summary cards, progress bar, conditions list with verify buttons, parties/financial/blockchain/timeline sidebars. Full escrow lifecycle tested: create → extract-conditions → deposit → verify all conditions → settle.
seed_data_creation: Created test escrow 'TEST_123 Oak Street Purchase' ($450,000) - now settled. Pre-existing escrow 87a20fa4-2903-4db6-bc47-0972918dfa5e has 2/6 conditions verified after testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Escrow Intelligence feature fully tested. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_escrow_intelligence.py covers all 8 endpoints. Pre-existing escrow 87a20fa4-2903-4db6-bc47-0972918dfa5e now has 2/6 conditions verified. MOCKED: AI condition extraction, Stripe deposits, HTS tokens, HCS settlement are all mocked (returns simulated data).

mocked_apis.AI Condition Extraction: Returns fixed 6 real estate conditions (inspection, financing, title, appraisal, closing, walkthrough)
mocked_apis.Hedera HCS Settlement: Returns simulated transaction with topic ID and sequence number

crud.test_create_escrow: PASS - Returns escrow_id, title, amount, status=draft
crud.test_list_escrows: PASS - Returns escrows array with total count
crud.test_get_escrow_detail: PASS - Returns full escrow with parties, financial, conditions, blockchain, timeline

deposit.test_deposit_funds: PASS - Returns Stripe PI, HTS token, creation hash

settlement.test_verify_all_conditions_and_settle: PASS - Settlement executed with HCS transaction

escrow_list_page.escrow_cards: PASS - Show title, amount, status badge, conditions count

create_form.additional_fields: PASS - buyer name, seller name, seller email, document name, description

detail_page.summary_cards: PASS - Amount, Deposit Status, Conditions, Progress
detail_page.financial_sidebar: PASS - data-testid='escrow-financial' with Stripe PI, HTS Token

verify_flow.click_verify: PASS - Condition status changes to met
verify_flow.progress_updates: PASS - Progress bar and count update
